## Document

Which document is affected?

## Problem

What is unclear, missing, outdated, or inconsistent?

## Language

- [ ] English
- [ ] 中文
- [ ] Both

## Suggested change

What should the document say instead?

## Public/private boundary

Does the suggested content include private URLs, private implementation details, credentials, or unverified release claims?

- [ ] No
- [ ] Yes, and it needs redaction
